subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! In this glorious Dispensation and mighty century, when the Sun of the Covenant, like unto the supreme luminary, shineth forth upon the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی در این عهد جلیل و قرن عظیم که آفتاب میثاق چون نیر اعظم آفاق
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
